contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Partner Check-in v0.3: contributor-leading UX, auto-schedule, immediate dispatch, tabs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/235
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/237
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/238
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/239
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/240
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/241
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/244
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/245
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/246
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/283
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/284
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/285
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/287
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/288
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/27
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1055
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/126
  
  Details:
  Second pass on the Partner Check-in surface after Gary's first live test run. 17 PRs across 5 repos, 8 clasp deploys, 1 Edgar prod deploy.
  
  UI / UX:
  - Contributor-leading flow: contributor select first (alpha sorted, populated from new list_partner_contributors API), partner select auto-fills from Agroverse Partners col E. Supports 1:N (contributor → multiple partners).
  - Pop-up vendor synthesis: Agroverse Partners rows with no partner_id (Rune, Gary, Samantha) now get a synthesized popup-<slug> so they appear in the dropdown and the scanner accepts their events.
  - Next Check-in Date is auto-computed from per-partner sell-through + venue inventory (formula: stock / monthly_rate * 30 - 7 buffer, clamped 7-60 days; falls back to category_medians when partner has no history). Pre-fills the input but remains editable for overrides.
  - Submit Another flow: post-submit, button flips to 'Log Another Check-in' and resets the form (mirrors report_contribution UX).
  - Needs Attention split into three tabs (Low stock / Dormant / Follow up due) with count chips; first non-empty tab is active by default.
  - Method extended with WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook Messenger; Contributor Name is now a dropdown (no free-typing) to avoid the The Way Home Shop col-T-clear incident.
  - Desktop two-column layout (≥980px): form left, Needs Attention sticky right.
  - TrueSight DAO logo restored at the top.
  
  Backend / data:
  - New shipping_planner action list_partner_contributors returning active partners + canonical contributor_contact_id from Agroverse Partners.
  - listPartnersNeedingAttention now picks latest entry per partner by submitted_at, not check_in_date (backdated entries no longer keep stale next-check-in dates stuck as overdue).
  - API responses normalize Date-typed cells to ISO YYYY-MM-DD via Utilities.formatDate (avoids JS Date toString format leaking to the UI).
  - Scanner parser bug fixed: hyphenated labels (Check-in Date, Next Check-in Date) now normalize correctly to underscored keys; both date fields are no longer silently empty.
  - States!AA dropdown extended for new Method values; Partner Check-ins col E validation range refreshed to cover them.
  
  Edgar dispatch:
  - sentiment_importer dao_controller wires the partner-check-in event tag into the existing per-event WebhookTriggerWorker dispatch table (config.partner_check_in_processing_webhook_url defaults to the find_nearby_stores deployment).
  - Submissions now land in Main Ledger Partner Check-ins within seconds via the sidekiq path, not the 30-min cron.
  - ./deploy.sh ran cleanly to seni_ror_new + seni_sk_new.
  
  Service worker:
  - CACHE_NAME bumped v11 → v13 across the work to evict stale cached partner_check_in.html for clients hitting the page before the recent merges.
  
  PRs:
  dapp: #235, #237, #238, #239, #240, #241, #244, #245, #246
  tokenomics: #283, #284, #285, #287, #288
  dao_client: #27
  sentiment_importer: #1055
  agentic_ai_context: #126
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
